about_text.value: Core lexicon: claim, witness, route, ledger, basin, authority, var. Payload is who gets to route next.

characters.name: Orbit Core
characters.description: Authority machine. Treats law as flow control.

characters.name: Shadow Copy
characters.description: Witness image. Converts hidden state into friction.

characters.name: Registrar
characters.description: Ledger monitor. No force, long memory.

text_script.value: Dock. Authority wants control. Witness wants exposure. Ledger wants admissible trace.
dock silent route
Silent route accepted. Noise down.
Privileged token admitted. Symmetry down.
dock declared route
Declared route accepted. Sensors wake.
Skewed declaration reframes var as sincerity.
Seal ring wants pre-stamped legitimacy.
seal route
Act I: route biases signal_noise; ledger records gain.
Act I: route hardens; seam logged.
split route
Act I: shear favors heat_resolve; authority diffuses.
Act I: variance kept; basin count preserved.

seal basin
The chamber emits a final packet into the ending field.
The chamber biases the ending field without fully sealing it.
reopen basin
The chamber shears the ending field toward a rival basin.
The chamber keeps multiple endings alive for one more recompute.
Command offers finality through open force.

Ledger wins. Procedure becomes quiet enough to trust.
Witness wins. Authority survives by becoming inspectable.
Authority wins. Command outranks consensus.
Var wins. Adaptive error becomes governor.
No basin clears. Orbit Null persists by brittle truce.
